epilote_prod.sync: function sync(doc, oldDoc) { if (doc.type === 'module' || doc.type === 'plan' || doc.type === 'config_modules' || doc.type === 'config_plans' || doc.type === 'config_categories') { channel('global'); return; } if (doc.schoolId) { var schoolChannel = 'sch::' + doc.schoolId; channel(schoolChannel); requireAccess(schoolChannel); } if (doc.groupId && !doc.schoolId) { var groupChannel = 'grp::' + doc.groupId; channel(groupChannel); requireAccess(groupChannel); } if (oldDoc && oldDoc._locked === true) { throw({ forbidden: 'Document verrouille, modification interdite' }); } }
